Label: Modifier to Know
Description 2: First drug in a multiple drug unit dose formulation
Usage Note 2: First drug when multiple drugs are in one unit-dose.
Description 3: Second or subsequent drug in a multiple drug unit dose formulation
Usage Note 3: Each additional drug after KP in multi-drug unit-dose.
Description 4: Drug amount discarded or not administered to the patient
Usage Note 4: Requires a separate line on the same claim. Primary line must show >0 units administered. JW line shows wasted/discarded quantity. Both lines must reflect the same NDC and J-code.
Description 5: Zero wastage — no drug was discarded
Usage Note 5: Use when no drug was discarded. Required by some payers when JW is not applicable.
JW Modifier — Example Line 1: Line 1: J-code | 2 ML administered | same NDC | same DOS
JW Modifier — Example Line 2: Line 2: J-code + JW | 0.5 ML discarded | same NDC | same DOS If the JW line is the only line, or if the administered line shows zero units, the claim will deny.
JW Modifier — Explanation: If the JW line is the only line, or if the administered line shows zero units, the claim will deny.
